name: RingProgress
description: Give user feedback for status of the task with circle diagram
searchText: ringprogress give user feedback for status of the task with circle diagram @mantine/core /core/ring-progress label rootcolor roundcaps sectiongap sections size startangle thickness transitionduration

props.name: label
props.description: Label displayed in the center of the ring

props.name: rootColor
props.description: Color of the unfilled portion of the ring (background). Defaults to gray-2 in light mode, dark-4 in dark mode

props.name: roundCaps
props.description: Applies rounded line caps to the start and end of visible sections

props.name: sectionGap
props.description: Gap between sections in degrees. Reduces the visual size of each section

props.name: sections
props.description: Array of sections to display in the ring. Each section should have a value (0-100), color, and optional tooltip. Sections can also receive any valid SVG circle element props.

props.name: size
props.description: Width and height of the progress ring

props.name: startAngle
props.description: Starting angle in degrees. 0 = right, 90 = bottom, 180 = left, 270 = top

props.name: thickness
props.description: Ring thickness in pixels. Cannot exceed size / 4 and will be automatically clamped if necessary

props.name: transitionDuration
props.description: Transition duration in milliseconds for section value and color changes
